But sanctify the Lord God in your hearts: and be ready always to give an answer to every man that asketh you a reason of the hope that is in you with meekness and fear:
And as touching the matter which thou and I have spoken of, behold, the Lord be between thee and me for ever.
But to the king of Judah which sent you to inquire of the Lord, thus shall ye say to him, Thus saith the Lord God of Israel, As touching the words which thou hast heard;

And we have confidence in the Lord touching you, that ye both do and will do the things which we command you.
And as touching the matter which thou and I have spoken of, behold, the Lord be between thee and me for ever.

But the eye of their God was upon the elders of the Jews, that they could not cause them to cease, till the matter came to Darius: and then they returned answer by letter concerning this matter.
And now the spirit of Alma was again troubled; and he went and inquired of the Lord what he should do concerning this matter, for he feared that he should do wrong in the sight of God.

Put upon thy servants the testimony of the covenant, that when they go out and proclaim thy word they may seal up the law, and prepare the hearts of thy saints for all those judgments thou art about…

And if I go and prepare a place for you, I will come again, and receive you unto myself; that where I am, there ye may be also.
O Lord God of Abraham, Isaac, and of Israel, our fathers, keep this for ever in the imagination of the thoughts of the heart of thy people, and prepare their heart unto thee:

And this shall be a law unto you, that ye receive not the teachings of any that shall come before you as revelations or commandments;
